use_cases: Creating interactive tabbed interfaces with smooth animated transitions between content sections
Displaying model or feature information with dynamic waveform visualizations in cards
Building product showcases with color-coded tab navigation and hover effects
ai_summary: An animated tab card component featuring smooth motion/react transitions and dynamic waveform visualizations. Supports custom icons, color-coded tabs, and animated card content with layered SVG waveforms. Designed for showcasing features or models with engaging visual feedback on tab selection.
